steps.title: Use the goal exactly
steps.content: The student wants to provide a quotation from chapter 5. The notes include one chapter 5 quotation, in Boym's discussion of the Soviet-style restaurant the Nostalgija Snack Bar in Ljubljana.

steps.title: Exclude summaries
steps.content: A refers to chapter 4, C gives only a broad description of the book, and D mentions the restaurant but does not quote Boym. The matching choice includes the chapter 5 quotation and gives its context. The answer is B.
